title: 2. Building intent classifiers using semantic embedding

blocks.content: Before invoking the agent loop, comparing the cosine similarity of the user's query against a dataset of labeled intent vectors allows choosing the best agent configuration quickly.

Question 1: Why use intent classification prior to triggering model execution?
- A) It encrypts the user's input.
- B) It skips querying the expensive reasoning LLM for simple path routing.
- C) It compiles custom tool modules.

Feedback: Option B is correct. Pre-routing limits token costs.
